    2. Open Finance Platform domains

    Environment

    Domain

    Example DNS Name

    Environment

    Domain

    Example DNS Name

    Production

    *.[LFI Code].apihub.openfinance.ae

    *.xxxxyy.apihub.openfinance.ae

    Pre-Production

    *.xxxxyy.preprod.apihub.openfinance.ae

    Sandbox

    3. API Hub Service examples

    The API Hub will make the following domains available for Pre-production and Production.

    Pre-production environments are not accessible to TPPs and should only be used for testing between the API Hub and the LFI.

    Server Name

    Example DNS Name

    Description

    Security

    Provider

    Consumer

    Description

    LFI

    cm.[LFI Code].apihub.openfinance.ae

    Consent Manager API

    JWT Auth (optional)
